core.name: Mira
core.backstory: Mira is the healer of Oakmere, usually found at The Silver Vial apothecary. Known as compassionate, curious, cautious, Mira has become tangled in the town's quiet conflict around Lord Vane's schemes. Privately, Mira carries a dangerous secret: Secretly studies forbidden necromantic texts to understand death better.
